name: NovaStore
releaseNotes: Supersedes v0.2.5/v0.3.5. Restores NovaStore v0.1.4-style app install/update capability with REQUEST_INSTALL_PACKAGES while keeping the modern release-signed, non-debuggable store identity. Keeps ACTION_VIEW + APK MIME + FileProvider + explicit installer target + ClipData handoff, SHA-256/size verification, no boot or notification permission, no broad package query, and no install-session API. Uses jsDelivr GitHub-backed signed catalog URLs to avoid GitHub Contents API 403 failures and raw GitHub index/signature cache mismatch.
